title: SellingPrivileges

sellerRegistrationCompleted.description: If this field is returned as true, the seller's registration is completed. If this field is returned as false, the registration process is not complete.

sellingLimit.description: This container lists the monthly cap for the quantity of items sold and total sales amount allowed for the seller's account. This container may not be returned if a seller does not have a monthly cap for total quantity sold and total sales amount.

description: This type is used by the base response of the getPrivileges method.
